zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Greville於大約1431年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾德雷頓時，他的父親John Greville33歲，母親Joyce Cokesay31歲。他和Elizabeth Herbert至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1528年6月22日在英國格盧斯特斯爾洛維爾 萊明頓享年98歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾維斯頓--阿文。

nameMeanings.name: Greville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English, Irish: locative name from Gréville (Manche), common in Ireland.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Greville was born about 1431, in Drayton, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Greville, was 33 and his mother, Joyce Cokesay, was 31. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Elizabeth Herbert. He died on 22 June 1528, in Lower Lemington, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 98, and was buried in Weston-on-Avon, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Greville est né environ 1431, à Drayton, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Greville, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Joyce Cokesay, avait 31 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Elizabeth Herbert. Il est décédé le 22 juin 1528, à Lower Lemington, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 98 ans, et a été enterré à Weston-on-Avon, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Grevilleが約1431年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアドレイトンで生まれた時，父John Grevilleは33歳，母Joyce Cokesayは31歳であった。彼はElizabeth Herbertとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1528年6月22日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアロウエル レミントンで98歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアウエストン-オン-アボンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Greville(이)가 대략 1431년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 드라이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Greville(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Joyce Cokesay(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Herbert(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1528년 6월 22일 영국 그루스스터실르 로어 러밍턴에서 98세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 웨스토--아폰에 묻혔다.

Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Elizabeth Herbert. Ele faleceu em 22 de junho de 1528, em Lower Lemington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 98 anos, e foi sepultado em Weston-on-Avon, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Greville родился около 1431 г. в местности дреитон, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Greville было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Joyce Cokesay, 31. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Elizabeth Herbert. Он умер 22 июня 1528 г. в местности лоуир лемингтон, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 98 лет и был похоронен в местности вестон-он-авон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания.
